chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2099 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8311/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8312/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 22-12-2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
